title: Cats stuff
description: A mod that adds a new cat dimension and items arrmor an so on...
body:
#                    **Cats Stuff**
 
 
 is a whimsical and content-rich Minecraft mod that brings an entire universe of **cat-themed features** to the game. From **powerful tools** to **magical systems** and even a full-blown **cat dimension**, this mod is a purr-fect addition for players who love adventure, creativity — and cats.


--------------------------------------------------------



## ✨ Features ✨

**Catium Tools and Gear**
Mine, fight, and explore with high-tier tools made from Catium, a mysterious and powerful new resource.

**The Cat Dimension**
A strange and magical realm filled with cat-themed biomes, blocks, and challenges.

**Magical Mechanics**
Discover unique magic systems with wands, mystical blocks, and arcane crafting inspired by feline legends.

**Custom Cat Bosses**
Face off against powerful cat entities with special mechanics and rewarding loot.

**Decorative Cat Paintings**
Decorate your builds with 8 original cat-themed paintings.

---------------------------------------------------------

## 📦 Installation 📦
Cats Stuff requires NeoForge and Minecraft 1.20.1.

**To install:**

1. Download and install NeoForge.
1. Download the latest version of Cats Stuff from Modrinth.
1. Place the .jar file into your mods folder.
1. Launch the game with the NeoForge profile.
1. Make sure no conflicting mods are installed alongside Cats Stuff.

---------------------------------------------------

## 🛠️ Requirements 🛠️

Minecraft: 1.21.4

Mod Loader: NeoForge

Java: 21+
